title: Adjutant general; administration, control, and responsibility
doc_html:
§512.  Adjutant general; administration, control, and responsibility

The adjutant general of Louisiana shall administer, control, and be responsible for the care of the institution and its residents, in accordance with the provisions of this Part.
doc_text:
§512.  Adjutant general; administration, control, and responsibility
The adjutant general of Louisiana shall administer, control, and be responsible for the care of the institution and its residents, in accordance with the provisions of this Part.
